items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing growing pressure to invest in cybersecurity, with local banks spending over AUD $4,000 daily on specialist staff alone. Many Australian firms are responding by moving toward unified security platforms to simplify their defences and reduce costs. Separately, a critical vulnerability called WP2Shell is putting millions of WordPress websites at risk of remote takeover — relevant to any organisation running a WordPress site.

Business email compromise (BEC) phishing attacks are also becoming harder to detect as attackers combine multiple evasion techniques. **Practical tip:** If your organisation uses WordPress, check with your web administrator today to ensure all plugins and core software are fully up to date.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: AI security incidents already affecting majority of Australian organisations, signalling urgent need for defensive strategies.
